_publications._publicationTitle: A machine learning classifier trained on cancer transcriptomes detects NF1 inactivation signal in glioblastoma.

_contextSnippet: We also observed variable EGFR content in these samples, with non-existent to low levels (3HQ, YXL, R7K), or medium to large EGFR signal (CB2, H5M, PBH, LNA, YXL, VVN, RIW, TRM, UNY, W31)
details: Successfully detected variable EGFR content in GBM samples, ranging from non-existent to low levels (3HQ, YXL, R7K) to medium to large EGFR signal in other samples
